case_title: VORTEX INDUSTRIES, INC. VS. LITTLE TOKYO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VORTEX INDUSTRIES, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VORTEX INDUSTRIES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LITTLE TOKYO $1,055.40 PRINCIPAL, $89.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,144.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY VORTEX INDUSTRIES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $59.00 SERVED JUL-09-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LITTLE TOKYO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-21-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-21-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHASON L. SHAW--TEAM LEADER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,055.40 FILED BY VORTEX INDUSTRIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LITTLE TOKYO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.
